valid.name: create-table-as
valid.code: CREATE TABLE archived_users AS SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE inactive;

valid.name: plain-select
valid.code: SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE inactive;

invalid.name: select-into
invalid.code: SELECT id, name INTO archived_users FROM users WHERE inactive;

errors.message: `SELECT ... INTO target FROM ...` creates a new table whose semantics differ from a regular `SELECT` and conflict with PL/pgSQL's `SELECT INTO variable`. Use `CREATE TABLE target AS SELECT ...` so the intent is explicit.
